questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
$X(\mathrm{~s}) \xrightarrow{\text { dil } \mathrm{HCl}} \mathrm{Y} \uparrow \xrightarrow{\left[\mathrm{Na}_3\left(\mathrm{Fe}(\mathrm{CNO})_3(\mathrm{NO})\right]\right.}$ Purple solution Gas $Y$ has been allowed to react with following Biack species in neutralacidic medium
(A) $\mathrm{FeCl}_3$
(B) $\mathrm{CuSO}_4$
(C) $\mathrm{BaCl}_2$
(D) $\mathrm{SO}_2$
(E) $\mathrm{Cr}_2 \mathrm{O}_7^{2-}$
(F) $\mathrm{CH}_3 \mathrm{COONa}^{-}$
(G) $\mathrm{Hg}^{2+}$

Then calculate value of ( $\mathrm{P}+\mathrm{Q}-\mathrm{R}$ )
$P$ : Number of species which undergoes redox reaction with gas $Y$
Q : Number of species which give black ppt with gas $Y$
P : Number of species with which gas Y produce no observable change
questions.solution: (a) $2 \mathrm{FeCl}_3+2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S} \uparrow \xrightarrow[\text { Nevicil }]{\text { Acitic }} 2 \mathrm{Fe}^{2+}+\mathrm{S} \downarrow+4 \mathrm{H}^{+}+6 \mathrm{Cl}^{-}$ (b) $\mathrm{CuSO}_4+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S} \uparrow \xrightarrow[\text { Nentral }]{\text { Acidicl }} \underset{\text { Black }}{\mathrm{CuS}_1}+2 \mathrm{H}^{+}+\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-}$ (c) $\mathrm{BaCl}_2+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S} \uparrow \xrightarrow[\text { Neatral }]{\text { Acidc }} \underset{\text { No observable charge }}{\mathrm{Ba}^{2+}}+2 \mathrm{Cl}^{-}+2 \mathrm{H}^{+}+\mathrm{S}^{2-}$ (d) $\mathrm{SO}_2 \uparrow+2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S} \uparrow \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{~S} \downarrow+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$ or $\mathrm{SO}_2 \uparrow+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{SO}_3 \xrightarrow{\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~s}} \mathrm{~S} \downarrow+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$ (e) $\mathrm{Cr}_2 \mathrm{O}_7^{2-}+8 \mathrm{H}^{+}+3 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S} \uparrow \xrightarrow[\text { Nentril }]{\text { Andol }} 2 \mathrm{Cr}^{3+}+\mathrm{S} \downarrow+7 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$ (g) $\mathrm{Hg}^{2+}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S} \xrightarrow[\text { Neveltal }]{\text { Acede }} \underset{\text { Back }}{\mathrm{HgS}} \downarrow+2 \mathrm{H}^{+}$ $\therefore P=3 ; \quad Q=2 ; \quad R=2$ Hence value of $(P+Q-R)=3+2-2=3$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
